gap_classification_legend.OWNED: Orchestrator generates this artifact via a callable phase function
gap_classification_legend.VALIDATED_ONLY: Orchestrator checks existence/correctness but has no generation path when absent
gap_classification_legend.ASSUMED_PRESENT: Orchestrator reads artifact without any validation phase — silently fails if absent
gap_classification_legend.ORPHANED_SCRIPT: Script exists in repo that generates this artifact but is never invoked by orchestrator
gap_classification_legend.CONFORMANCE_BYPASS: Artifact is injected via fastapi_conformance_path; bypasses native generation

gap.description: Opens archive_path as a binary file (SHA256 check). If BE-00 is absent, phase fails with FileNotFoundError. No invocation path to fetch or generate the source archive.
gap.remediation_action: Add intake phase: invoke PI.BLUEEDGE.CLEAN-INTAKE.01 equivalent when archive absent, or define source provisioning contract.

gap.description: Checks that canonical_repo directory exists and intake_manifest.json is present. If absent, phase fails. No invocation of extraction script.
gap.remediation_action: Add extraction sub-phase: invoke extraction when canonical_repo absent, deriving it from BE-00.

gap.description: Checks existence of 3 structural artifact files. If absent, prints REMEDIATION message referencing PI.BLUEEDGE.STRUCTURAL-PIPELINE.40X.01 but does NOT invoke any script. Scripts scan_repository.sh, extract_entities.py, classify_files.py, extract_perm_entities.py, build_telemetry_artifacts.py exist in scripts/pios/40.x/ but are never called by this phase.
gap.remediation_action: Wire orphaned scripts into phase_03 as a generation sub-phase when structural artifacts are absent. Or invoke bootstrap_fastapi_40x.py equivalent per client.

gap.description: Reads grounding_state_v3.json and checks readiness_gate == PASS. If absent or not PASS, phase fails. No invocation of grounding pipeline. BE-12 is produced by PI.BLUEEDGE Integrated Pipeline (external).
gap.remediation_action: Add grounding generation sub-phase: invoke CEU grounding pipeline or grounding state migration script when grounding_state_v3 absent or not at PASS gate.

gap.description: BE-11 (ceu_grounding_registry) and BE-14 (dom_path_domain_layer) are read as required inputs with no prior validation phase. If either is absent and fastapi_conformance_path is not set, phase fails with KeyError or FileNotFoundError. No validation gate protects these inputs.
gap.remediation_action: Add input validation for dom_layer_path and ceu_grounding_registry_path in source_manifest schema. Or make Phase 5 generate these from upstream grounding artifacts.

gap.description: Native path invokes run_end_to_end.py as subprocess. Conformance path copies pre-computed artifacts. Both paths are orchestrator-owned. Gap is upstream dependency on BE-15.
gap.remediation_action: No gap at this phase. Ensure BE-15 is properly generated by phase_05.

gap.description: BE-13 (integration_validation) and BE-14 (dom_path_domain_layer) are read without any prior validation phase. BE-12 is validated by phase_04 but only for readiness_gate field. If integration_validation_path is absent from source_manifest and fastapi_conformance_path is not set, phase fails. FastAPI source_manifest is missing dom_layer_path and integration_validation_path fields.
gap.remediation_action: Add dom_layer_path and integration_validation_path to source_manifest schema. Add validation gate for integration_validation before phase_08a. Or supply via conformance path.

gap.description: Invokes lens_report_generator.py and export_graph_state.mjs as subprocesses. Fully orchestrator-owned. Gap is upstream dependency on vault artifacts.
gap.remediation_action: No gap at this phase. Ensure vault artifacts BE-21 through BE-29 are generated by phase_08a.

gap.description: Fully orchestrator-owned. Reads report outputs and graph state from phase_08b. Gap is upstream dependency on reports.

unphased_artifact_gaps.description: Produced by extract_perm_entities.py (scripts/pios/40.3/). Not validated by any phase. Not read by any phase. Exists in artifact inventory but has no consumer in the orchestrator. Script is orphaned.
unphased_artifact_gaps.remediation_action: Determine if perm_entity_registry is consumed downstream. If not, deprecate. If yes, add consumer phase.

unphased_artifact_gaps.description: Produced by build_telemetry_artifacts.py (scripts/pios/40.4/). Not validated by any phase. Not read by any phase. Script is orphaned.
unphased_artifact_gaps.remediation_action: Determine if telemetry summary is consumed downstream. If not, deprecate. If yes, add consumer phase.

unphased_artifact_gaps.description: Required as native path input to phase_05. Produced by CEU Grounding Pipeline (PROD-04). No validation phase checks its existence before phase_05. No phase generates it.
unphased_artifact_gaps.remediation_action: Add to phase validation chain or make phase_05 conditionally generate from upstream grounding artifacts.

unphased_artifact_gaps.description: Required by phase_08a (admissibility proxy). Produced by PI.BLUEEDGE Integrated Pipeline (PROD-05). No validation phase checks existence. Not registered in source_manifest schema for new clients.
unphased_artifact_gaps.remediation_action: Add integration_validation_path to source_manifest schema. Add validation gate before phase_08a.

unphased_artifact_gaps.description: Required by phase_05 (DOM majority-vote for CE assignment) and phase_08a (topology domains construction). Lives in docs/, not clients/. No validation phase. Not registered in source_manifest for new clients.
unphased_artifact_gaps.remediation_action: Add dom_layer_path to source_manifest schema. Add validation gate. Or generate from 40.x structural artifacts within orchestrator.

closure_blockers: Phases 1-4 are validation-only with no generation path
BE-11, BE-13, BE-14 have no validation gate and no generation path
FastAPI source_manifest missing dom_layer_path and integration_validation_path
